project_info.name: VideyView
project_info.stack: Laravel 10 (Backend) + Inertia.js / Vue 3 (Frontend) + Tailwind CSS + XAMPP

authentication.security_note: Forgot Password link redirected to Telegram; Admin can reset all passwords via Dashboard.

categorization_system.architecture: Full-stack categorization with dynamic admin management and user-facing portlets.
categorization_system.admin_panel: Dedicated CRUD at /admin/categories with name, slug, icon (emoji/svg), and sort order.
categorization_system.video_integration: nullable category_id field in videos table, eager-loaded for optimal performance.
categorization_system.user_ui: Dynamic category list in mobile BottomNavBar, dedicated category landing views via slug routing.

watchlist_v2.feature: Integrated 'Simpan' tab in BottomNavBar for instant access to personalized bookmarks.
watchlist_v2.backend: optimized whereHas('watchlists') query in primary VideoController.

mobile_spark_v2.updates: Deep mobile optimization pass ensures zero component overlap.
features: Dynamic Category Bottom Sheet: Glassmorphic category picker with icons.
Filter Indicators: Smart UI chips showing active category/tag filters with one-click clear.
Tag Scroller: Enhanced with active-state highlighting (Indigo gradient).

video_hosting: Manual URL Link for external CDNs (Videy.co, etc.)
Video Proxy (/video-proxy) to bypass ISP/WAF restrictions on Videy links.
ISP Bypass Client (App\Helpers\IspBypassClient) using CURLOPT_RESOLVE for hosting APIs.
Fast-Intake Bulk JSON: Process thousands of links via automated background workers.

thumbnail_system.mechanism: FFmpeg thumbnail extraction on-demand or batch.

monetization: Rebranded 'Special Offer' button as 'DOWNLOAD VIDEO' (Smartlink integration)
Subscription System: hasActiveSubscription() for premium content.
Admin Ad Guard: Internal AdHandler security to prevent ad leakage in Dashboard.

features: Aggressive Baiting: Combined <ins> and <div> traps with randomized ID cycling every 1s.
Mutation Monitoring: MutationObserver targeting 'ins iframe' to detect 1px scaling/hiding hacks.
Self-Healing: Automatic modal re-render if deleted via DevTools.
Zero-Cooldown: Removed cycle limits to ensure 24/7 active radar.
Trust-JS Recovery: Prioritizes successful ads-check.js loading for instant hard-refresh recovery.

video_health_monitoring.mechanism: 3-Layer Validation (Local Storage, Videy CDN HEAD, Streamtape API Status).
video_health_monitoring.storage: Persistent health_report (JSON) and last_check_at (Timestamp) fields in videos table.
video_health_monitoring.automation: Artisan Command (video:check-health) and Manual Trigger in Admin Dashboard.
video_health_monitoring.ui_indicators: Color-coded status dots (LOC, VDY, TAP) in Admin Video Management grid.

admin_visibility_2.0: Hosting Badges: Visual overlays (Local, Videy, Tape) on thumbnails for instant oversight.
Server Identity Masking: Conditional rendering hides host names from guests, showing only to Admins.
VIP Support UI: Redesigned Member Priority box with pulsing emerald status and premium aesthetics.

stages: FLOW 1 (Direct Upload): Admin upload file dari pc ke aplikasi -> simpan di local aplikasi -> aplikasi upload ke videy.co (jika bisa) dan streamtape (prioritas). Thumbnail sync via sync.py.

FLOW 2 (Bulk JSON): Admin upload file json link videy.co -> simpan data link -> aplikasi download ke lokal (manual user via sync.py) -> app cek video & thumbnail lokal -> jika ada, upload ke streamtape.
ISP BYPASS 2.0: Direct backend IP mapping (Videy: 172.67.73.18, Streamtape: 195.35.23.222) via CURLOPT_RESOLVE.
SMART SYNC v5.2: Automated Streamtape link parsing extracting slugs from filenames (e.g., video-video-slug.mp4) for 100% matched accuracy without manual markers.
REAL-TIME SYNC: Worker-to-Master percentage reporting (every 5%) for active transparency.
ASYNC REMOTE TRACKING: App\Jobs\CheckRemoteUploadJob dispatched to prioritize 'checkers' queue for polling api.streamtape.to status.
automated_distribution_pipeline.flash_audit: Admin > Videos > 'Sync Storage' triggers high-speed O(1) directory scanning to reconcile 2,000+ files in seconds.

features: On-Demand Fetch: Links provided via timed AJAX only upon playback intent.
Link Masking: No raw cdn.videy.co or streamtape.com URLs in DOM/Network Tab.
Proxy Engine: Uses PHP cURL with Host header spoofing and User-Agent mirroring.
ISP Bypass: Integrates specific Cloudflare and Global Edge IPs to circumvent DNS/SNI hijacking.
API Obfuscation: Sensitive credentials (Streamtape API, etc.) are masked in Admin UI with toggle visibility.

ui_template_engine_v6.overview: Admin-switchable UI template system allowing real-time toggling between Classic Royale and Mobile Spark.

classic.name: Classic Royale
classic.desktop_behavior: Floating navbar, overlay titles, rounded-[40px] cards.
classic.mobile_behavior: Title below thumbnail + Bottom Nav Bar.

spartankobs.name: Mobile Spark
spartankobs.behavior: Mobile-first, persistent bottom navigation, titles always below thumbnails, tag scroller, category bottom sheet.

audit_system_v2.feature: Admin CRUD Activity Logs with Time-Travel (Undo/Redo).
capabilities: Track Create/Update/Delete operations for Videos, Categories, and Users.
One-click Restore for accidental deletions or edits.
Fully integrated into the Royale Light System Logs view.

v6.6.5_streamtape_smart_sync.feature: Unified Smart Sync for Streamtape & Doodstream.
updates: Added Substring Matching with LENGTH(slug) priority to prevent false positives.
Integrated unified Bulk Sync UI supporting both marker-based (Doodstream) and URL-based (Streamtape) inputs.

v6.6_admin_royale_light_normalization.feature: Fully normalized Royale Light aesthetic across entire Admin Panel.
updates: Re-themed core UI components (TextInput, Checkbox, Modal, Buttons) to dark-glass Royale aesthetic.
Implemented inline Emoji Picker for Categories management.
Normalized spacing, typography, and pad layouts across all dashboard pages.

maintenance_logs_current: v6.6.5: Streamtape Smart Sync (Slug Extraction) - DEPLOYED.
v6.6: Admin CRUD Activity Logs & Undo/Redo - ACTIVE.
v6.6: Component Normalization (Profile, Settings, Dashboard) - SYNCED.
